title: Water Balloons, 333Pcs Self-tying Rapid Fill Water Balloons, 9 Water Balloon Bunches Self Sealing Colorful Splash Water Balls for Beach Party
features: Environmental protection material: the water balloon is made of biodegradable natural latex, so it has very good elasticity and is not easy to break, is odourless, safe and non-toxic.
Quick filled: filling is very easy and fast. It is best to catch the full water balloons in a bucket filled with water, so they hold the longest and cannot break on the floor.

Elastic and comfortable to knot: no more tedious filling and knotting of water balloons. that can be filled in a few seconds. Add an appropriate amount of water to the water balloon. If the water is too full, the balloon bursts easily.

[Summer toy]: Colourful water balloons are enough for a big summer festival. Can have a lot of fun in a very nice summer. The balloon set can not only play as a water bomb as a toy for outdoors, it can also be used as a party decoration and target shooting etc.

Fun outdoors: water balloon is the best choice for children and adults to play. In the swimming pool, on the beach and in the garden, it can improve children's vitality and improve the relationship between parents and children.
